author: Haroen Viaene
subject: test(common): split widget/connector tests (#5746)
body:
* test(common): split widget/connector tests

- remove custom widget in widget tests
- remove usage of the original widget for refinement in "connector"/"custom widget" tests
- split tests into multiple files (so it can be read more easily)

The part hardest to transfer was moving from the refinement widget to a button in a custom widget, i don't think I made any mistakes, but that could be checked the most thoroughly

I was thinking on some kind of meta-test in the future to ensure we implement all tests in all flavours, but i'm not too sure what the way we could enforce that could be (looping over the test creators or something with typescript could be used, but all seem fragile)

FX-2468

* !fixup

* !fixup

* fix(vue): correct component for vue 3 (props required)

* retry jest

* test(ci): retry jest (even though it passed this time)

* typo
